description: Example AI summary result from POST /api/notes/:id/generate-summary

input.title: Weekly Team Sync - May 14
input.content:
## Attendees
- Sarah (PM)
- Alex (Engineering)
- Maria (Design)

## Discussion

### Feature X Launch
We reviewed the current status of Feature X. Alex mentioned that the backend is 90% done but there are still some edge cases to handle around error states. Maria showed updated designs that everyone approved.

### Bug Backlog
There are currently 12 open bugs, 3 of which are critical. The team agreed to prioritize these before the launch.

### Q3 Roadmap
Sarah presented the roadmap for Q3. The main focus will be on improving performance and onboarding a new partner integration.

## Action Items
- Alex: Fix the 3 critical bugs by Thursday
- Maria: Finalize the onboarding flow designs by EOD Friday
- Sarah: Send updated roadmap to stakeholders
- Everyone: Review Q3 OKRs document before next sync

output.summary: The weekly team sync covered the status of Feature X (90% complete with some edge cases remaining), reviewed 12 open bugs (3 critical) that need priority before launch, and discussed the Q3 roadmap focused on performance improvements and a new partner integration. Designs for Feature X were approved by the team.
action_items: Alex: Fix the 3 critical bugs by Thursday
Maria: Finalize the onboarding flow designs by EOD Friday
Sarah: Send updated roadmap to stakeholders
Everyone: Review Q3 OKRs document before next sync
output.suggested_title: Weekly Team Sync - May 14: Feature X Update and Q3 Roadmap
